General.Name: Bright Future Technology Holdings
General.Description: Bright Future Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the provision of intelligent marketing solutions in the People's Republic of China. The company offers smart marketing solutions, such as live broadcast, smart content, delivery, and targeted advertising and short video business platform solutions, including plan, development, filming, material, processing, production, intelligent project management system, and post investment analysis. It also provides influential placement services and subscription solutions. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Shenzhen, China.

3.Name: Ms. Yuqing  Gao
3.Title: Head of Performance Based Advertising Team & Executive Director
